sections.paragraph:
Ch. i.q. Heb. צָלַח, Aphel הַצְלַח (Heb. form)-

(1) trans. to cause any one to go on well, i.e. to promote quickly to public offices and honour (fchnell avanciren, fein Glück machen laffen), Dan 3:30 to accomplish anything prosperously, Ezr 6:14.

(2) to be prospered, i.e. to be raised to great honours, Daniel 6:29 to be prospered as a thing, Ezr 5:8.
